name: Indian Law Institute
description: The Indian Law Institute (ILI), Delhi, founded in 1956, is a leading institution focused on legal research and higher legal education. Situated in the midst of the capital, it contributes to shaping legal scholarship and policy-making in India. The institute enjoys a reputation for being strict academically, research-oriented, and a contributor to legal reforms. It provides a dynamic intellectual environment with state-of-the-art facilities, a rich library, and a culture of critical thinking and scholarly discourse. ILI is best known for its ability to produce legal minds dedicated to justice, academic merit, and public service.

name: Amity Law School
description: Amity Law School, Noida, founded in 2004, is a reputable school that specializes in academic brilliance, professional ethics, and all-around growth. Situated in Amity University's state-of-the-art campus, the school offers a lively learning experience backed by state-of-the-art infrastructure, seasoned faculty, and a rigorous focus on research and innovation. The students are actively engaged in moot courts, legal aid activities, seminars, and community outreach programs. The institution promotes critical thinking, leadership, and a high level of social responsibility. With its vibrant and diverse campus culture, Amity Law School trains its students to succeed as lawyers and make a valuable contribution towards society.

name: Ramaiah College of Law
description: Ramaiah College of Law, Bangalore, founded in 1995, is a well-reputed institution committed to imparting quality legal education in a modern academic setup. Situated in the midst of the city, the college is recognized for its emphasis on excellence in academics, ethics, and all-round student development. It provides a balanced education experience through legal research, community outreach, moot courts, and co-curricular activities. The campus is well-equipped with contemporary facilities, such as an efficient library and learning areas conducive to innovation and critical thinking. Ramaiah College of Law fosters future lawyers dedicated to justice, integrity, and responsibility to society.

name: Lloyd Law College
description: Lloyd Law College, Noida, founded in 2003, is a well-known college for its dedication to legal education and professional growth. Situated in the Delhi-NCR area, it provides a dynamic academic culture backed by state-of-the-art infrastructure, experienced staff, and a special emphasis on ethics and social justice. The college encourages experiential learning through moot courts, legal aid camps, seminars, and internships. Its focus on discipline, research, and community involvement assists in the development of socially committed and competent legal professionals. With students from diverse backgrounds and vibrant co-curricular life, Lloyd Law College promotes all-around development and equips students to meet the changing face of law.

name: Bharati Vidyapeeth New Law College
description: Bharati Vidyapeeth New Law College, Pune, founded in 1978, is a highly regarded institution for its supremacy in legal studies and sound moral base. It is situated in a lively academic precinct and provides a stimulating academic environment that fosters intellectual development, logical reasoning, and social commitment. The college focuses on the practical application of learning through endeavors such as legal aid, research, and community service. The campus boasts modern facilities, a modern library, and academic and personal growth spaces. With a history of graduating qualified legal professionals, the college maintains tenets of justice, integrity, and service, thus earning its reputation as a well-known institution in the legal profession.

name: Saveetha University
description: Saveetha University in Kuthambakkam, Chennai, is a prestigious private university that excels in both education and research in multiple disciplines. It provides a variety of programs in law, medicine, engineering, management, and others. Saveetha School of Law emphasizes the creation of legal professionals through a mixture of academic excellence, practical training, and moral foundation. The campus has state-of-the-art infrastructure, moot court rooms, libraries, and research facilities. Focusing on innovation and overall growth, the university encourages students to take part in internships, debates, and community service. Saveetha University aspires to churn out capable professionals with a strong sense of social accountability.

name: Jindal Global Law School
description: Jindal Global Law School (JGLS), Sonipat, Haryana, is a top private law school providing world-class legal education. It offers various programs like BA LL.B, BBA LL.B, LL.M, and Ph.D., with a focus on inter-disciplinary learning and global exposure. The school has an international faculty, contemporary campus amenities, and extensive partnerships with the world's top universities. JGLS encourages research, innovation, and pragmatic skills by conducting moot courts, internships, and legal clinics. It has a reputation for academic excellence and industry exposure, gearing students to become globally competitive legal professionals who are committed to justice and ethics.

name: ILS Law College
description: ILS Law College, Pune, is India's one of the oldest and most venerable institutions of law with a reputation for excellence in legal studies. Founded in 1924, the college teaches undergraduate and postgraduate degree courses like LL.B, B.A. LL.B, and LL.M. It focuses on a sound foundation in legal theory supplemented by practical training through moot courts, internships, and legal aid exercises. The campus is centrally located and equipped with modern academic facilities, libraries, and hostels. ILS fosters a liberal and inclusive environment, encouraging critical thinking, ethics, and social responsibility, making it a preferred choice for aspiring legal professionals across the country.

name: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology (KIIT)
description: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology (KIIT), Bhubaneswar, is a multidisciplinary university with high standards of education and infrastructure. It has a vast array of programs in engineering, law, management, medical sciences, and other subjects. KIIT School of Law offers integrated law courses, LL.M, and Ph.D. programs with emphasis on academic excellence, practical training, and legal research. The campus has excellent facilities, such as libraries, hostels, and moot court halls. With a strong focus on all-round development, KIIT draws students from all over India and even abroad. It is also well-known for its aggressive placement cell and societal responsibility.

name: ICFAI Law School Hyderabad Top Private Law College in Telangana
description: ICFAI Law School, Hyderabad – a constituent of IFHE (Deemed to be University) – is located in a green, campus environment near Hyderabad. The school offers five-year integrated UG programmes (BBA-LLB, BA-LLB, BAJ-LLB) approved by the Bar Council of India and full-time one-year LLM programmes in key specialisations like Corporate & Commercial Law, Tax Law, ADR, Insolvency & Bankruptcy and Criminal Law. With a contemporary, student-centric curriculum, choice-based credit system, smart classrooms, real-life moot court experience and strong industry interface, the institution prepares legal professionals for 21st-century challenges. The lush 91-acre campus, extensive library resources and internships strengthen practical readiness. Rankings place it among the top law schools in India.

admissionProcess.title: Application Submission
admissionProcess.description: Fill the online/offline application form and pay ₹1,000 registration fee. Appear for ILSAT entrance test conducted by ICFAI Law School.

admissionProcess.title: Selection Process
admissionProcess.description: Shortlisted candidates are called for Personal Interview based on ILSAT scores and academic record.

admissionProcess.title: Admission Confirmation
admissionProcess.description: Selected candidates must pay the admission fee (₹20,000) and first-semester tuition fee to confirm the seat.

admissionProcess.title: Orientation & Classes
admissionProcess.description: Attend orientation program and classes starting as per academic calendar (generally from August).

keyHighlights.title: Strong National Ranking
keyHighlights.description: Ranked among the top private law schools in South India by GHRDC and India Today.

keyHighlights.title: Research & Innovation
keyHighlights.description: Offers research opportunities, journals, and seminars on emerging legal issues.

keyHighlights.title: Experiential Learning
keyHighlights.description: Moot court competitions, legal aid clinics, and compulsory internships every semester.

keyHighlights.title: Strong Placement Support
keyHighlights.description: Dedicated placement cell, corporate tie-ups, and consistent 90%+ placement record.

placementHighlights: Average package of ₹ 6.48 LPA for UG Law graduates in 2023-24 (131/184 students placed).
Top recruiters include leading law firms, banks, and corporates such as HDFC, Amazon, Deloitte, and Aurobindo.
Highest package recorded up to ₹ 12 LPA for exceptional performers.
Dedicated placement cell offers internships, legal research training, and personality development programs to enhance employability.

requiredDocuments.name: 10th & 12th Mark Sheets
requiredDocuments.description: Proof of educational qualification

requiredDocuments.name: Entrance Exam Score / Admit Card
requiredDocuments.description: Verified ILSAT score for admission to UG law programme

requiredDocuments.name: Passport-size photograph / ID proof
requiredDocuments.description: Standard applicant identification and image as required in the online application.

requiredDocuments.description: For students seeking reservation benefits

shortDescription: Leading law school in Hyderabad offering 5-year integrated UG and 1-year LLM programs with strong industry exposure and modern infrastructure.

name: Army Institute of Law
description: Army Institute of Law (AIL) in Punjab is one of the top law schools set up in 1999 under the patronage of the Indian Army. It is situated in Mohali and conducts a five-year integrated BA LL.B course and a one-year LL.M course. The institute strives to impart quality legal education with an emphasis on discipline, ethics, and leadership. AIL is recognized by Punjabi University, Patiala, and approved by the Bar Council of India. The campus has state-of-the-art facilities, experienced faculty, and an excellent placement record. Though it mainly caters to the wards of Army personnel, civilian students can also be admitted through a special quota.

name: Symbiosis Law School
description: Symbiosis Law School, Pune is a revered institution with high standards of academics and all-around legal education. It was founded in 1977 and is a constituent college of Symbiosis International University offering undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral degrees in law. The school combines theory with practical exposure through moot courts, internship, legal aid clinics, and research. It has a cosmopolitan population of students, qualified faculty, and state-of-the-art infrastructure. Situated in the academic center of Pune, the institute encourages international outlook and inter-disciplinary studies. Symbiosis Law School has a robust placement history, with alumni performing well in law firms, corporate, and government services.

name: Andhra University school of law
description: Andhra University School of Law, Visakhapatnam, founded in 1945, is among India's oldest and most prestigious law schools. With its emphasis on scholarship and its rich tradition, the school has been at the forefront of legal education in the nation. The school provides an environment that nurtures research, critical analysis, and ethical principles. Located on a beautiful campus by the seaside, the school offers great educational infrastructure and a rich students' community. With special focus on social justice, public service, and legal scholarship, Andhra University School of Law continues to churn out capable and socially aware legal professionals.

name: Hidayatullah National Law University (HNLU)
description: Hidayatullah National Law University (HNLU), Chhattisgarh, founded in 2003, is among India's top-tier National Law Universities. The university is named after retired Chief Justice of India, Justice M. Hidayatullah, and is recognized for its excellence in academics, discipline, and adherence to justice. Located in a peaceful campus in Raipur, HNLU provides an intense academic experience backed by state-of-the-art infrastructure, seasoned faculty, and an intense research culture. The university focuses on experiential learning through moot courts, legal aid, internships, and policy debates. HNLU shapes future lawyers with integrity, critical thinking, and social responsibility while making significant contributions to the legal system.

name: Sikkim National Law University(SNLU)
description: Sikkim National Law University (SNLU), Gangtok, founded in 2018, is a young institution committed to imparting quality legal education to the northeastern part of India. Situated amidst the tranquil landscapes of Gangtok, it provides a calm and concentrated scholarly atmosphere. The university focuses on a holistic style of legal learning, blending theoretical underpinnings with practical exposure through moot courts, internships, and legal aid activities. With a mission to foster justice, equity, and legal consciousness, SNLU strives to create socially responsible and competent legal professionals. Though it is a younger institution, it is gradually gaining a reputation for scholarly pursuit and honesty.

name: National Law University
description: National Law University Jodhpur (NLUJ) is one of the top law schools in India, renowned for academic rigor and high-quality legal education. Founded in 1999, it provides integrated undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in law and related disciplines. The university has a competitive atmosphere by virtue of a rigorous curriculum, well-qualified faculty, and full involvement of students in moot courts, debating, and research. NLUJ's scenic campus, state-of-the-art infrastructure, and emphasis on interdisciplinarity ensure a rich academic environment. It is always ranked among India's top law schools with excellent placements in law firms, judiciary, civil services, and foreign institutions.

name: Maharashtra National Law University  (MNLU)
description: Maharashtra National Law University (MNLU), Nagpur, founded in 2016, is among India's newer National Law Universities, and it is dedicated to a tradition of legal education and research excellence. Situated in a fast-emerging academic center, the university offers a dynamic learning atmosphere with emphasis on innovation, ethics, and social justice. MNLU Nagpur focuses on experiential learning through moot courts, legal aid, internships, and policy debates. With an expanding body of experienced faculty and up-to-date facilities, the university promotes critical thinking, leadership, and a commitment to public service. It is increasingly becoming recognized for graduating competent, socially aware, and well-rounded legal professionals.

name: NUALS (National University of Advanced Legal Studies)
description: The National University of Advanced Legal Studies (NUALS), Kochi, founded in 2005, is one of the best National Law Universities renowned for academic excellence and contributions to legal research. Located in Kochi, the culturally vibrant city, NUALS has a calm and intellectually inspiring campus life. The university emphasizes a balanced strategy for legal education, grounding it in robust theoretical frameworks and practical exposure through moot courts, internships, seminars, and legal aid initiatives. Staffed with experienced teachers, world-class infrastructure, and an emphasis on ethics and public service, NUALS is equipped to make students fit to be competent, socially committed, and forward-looking legal professionals in a globalized era.

name: Tamil Nadu Dr. Ambedkar Law University
description: Tamil Nadu Dr. Ambedkar Law University, founded in 1997, is a renowned institution devoted to strengthening legal education and research in the state. It is situated in Chennai and is named after Dr. B.R. Ambedkar, the main creator of the Indian Constitution. The university is providing a dynamic academic environment based on constitutional principles, social justice, and equality. With emphasis on theoretical and practice-based learning, it promotes moot court participation, legal aid clinics, and research. As a university with a disciplined mindset and socially responsible approach of producing socially aware legal professionals, the institution is instrumental in shaping legal minds.

name: Government Law College
description: Government Law College (GLC), Mumbai, is among the oldest and most elite law colleges in Asia with a reputation for creating learned legal professionals. The University of Mumbai has a tie-up with GLC, and it provides undergraduate and postgraduate courses in law with special focus on academic achievement, legal ethics, and vocational training. The college boasts a rich history, experienced faculty, and a vibrant student community engaged in moot courts, debates, and legal aid activities. Located in the heart of Mumbai’s legal district, GLC provides students with unique exposure to the legal profession, judiciary, and corporate law practice from an early stage.

name: Chanakya National Law University (CNLU)
description: Chanakya National Law University (CNLU), Patna, is a prestigious institute dedicated to excellence in legal education, research, and professional growth. Founded to address the increasing need for quality legal education in eastern India, CNLU provides integrated undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in law. The university focuses on holistic learning with theory complemented by practical experience in moot courts, internships, and legal aid activities. With a committed faculty, state-of-the-art infrastructure, and emphasis on ethics and social justice, CNLU grows future legal practitioners capable of working to improve the legal system, public service, and policy-making at local, national, and international levels.

name: Rajiv Gandhi National University of Law
description: Rajiv Gandhi National University of Law (RGNUL), Punjab, is a leading national law university that is committed to offering high-quality legal education and developing research and innovation in the area of law. It provides integrated undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses with high focus on academic intensity, practical exposure, and interdisciplinarity. The university fosters legal consciousness, moral values, and social responsibility through moot courts, legal aid clinics, seminars, and internships. With well-trained faculty, state-of-the-art infrastructure, and active academic culture, RGNUL trains students to succeed in various legal careers and contribute significantly to justice, governance, and public policy.

name: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University
description: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar University (BBAU), Lucknow, is a central university dedicated to inclusive education, social justice, and excellence in academic pursuits. The university is named after Dr. B.R. Ambedkar and caters to programs at the undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral levels in various fields of study such as law, science, humanities, management, and social sciences. BBAU focuses on research, innovation, and empowering the marginalized sections of society through quality education. Being a campus of diverse students, qualified teaching staff, and up-to-date facilities, the university provides a culture of critical thinking and intellectual development. It is a powerful agent of nation-building and social change through responsible citizens and professionals.

name: National Law Institute University (NLU)
description: The National Law Institute University (NLIU) at Bhopal is a premier law school in India, known for academic excellence, research work, and addition to legal education. It provides integrated undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in law, with an emphasis on theoretical and practical knowledge. NLIU encourages an excellent legal base by providing moot courts, internships, seminars, and legal aid programs. The university boasts distinguished faculty, contemporary infrastructure, and active academic surroundings. NLIU focuses on innovation, ethics, and public service and trains students for distinguished careers in law, judiciary, policy-making, and corporate governance at national and international levels.

name: Madhusudan Law University
description: Madhusudan Law University, Cuttack, founded in 2021, is a committed academic institution for legal learning in the state of Odisha. Renamed after the illustrious legal stalwart Madhusudan Das, the university strives to maintain the principles of justice, honesty, and scholastic excellence. Situated in the ancient city of Cuttack, which is the legal capital of Odisha, the university provides a dedicated and vibrant learning atmosphere. It places emphasis on research, critical analysis, and practical orientation through moot courts, legal aid, and community service. As a developing institution, it aims to create capable, professional, and socially committed legal experts for the contemporary world.

name: The West Bengal National University of Juridical Sciences (NUJS)
description: The West Bengal National University of Juridical Sciences (NUJS), Kolkata, is a leading law university in India with an excellent record of academic standards and commitment to legal excellence. NUJS conducts integrated undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in law and allied subjects. NUJS is committed to overall legal education that involves theoretical learning as well as practical exposure in the form of moot courts, research, internships, and legal aid activities. The university has a renowned faculty, lively student population, and considerable emphasis on policy development and research. NUJS alumni are highly respected in public service, judiciary, legal practice, and academia, both globally and at the national level.

name: Gujarat National Law University  (GNLU)
description: Gujarat National Law University (GNLU) at Gandhinagar is a premier institution committed to legal education, research, and training. It provides integrated undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in law, business, and public policy. GNLU focuses on a multidisciplinary and practice-oriented mode of learning by conducting moot courts, internships, seminars, and legal aid clinics. GNLU is renowned for its rigorous academic culture, state-of-the-art facilities, and emphasis on innovation and ethics. With seasoned faculty and industry engagement, GNLU equips students to perform and excel in various legal professions and make significant contributions to the Indian legal system, policymaking, and corporate leadership.

name: NALSAR University of Law
description: NALSAR University of Law, Hyderabad, is one of India's premier law schools with a penchant for academic excellence and social justice. Founded to offer quality legal education, NALSAR has integrated undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs in law and allied subjects. The university encourages inter-disciplinary learning, critical thinking, and practical training through moot courts, internships, and legal aid programs. Through its lively campus life, seasoned faculty, and research- and policy-oriented education, NALSAR develops leaders in law, governance, and public affairs. NALSAR alumni are known to contribute powerfully to the legal profession, academia, and civil society.

name: National Law University (NLU)
description: National Law Universities (NLUs) in India are high-quality institutions committed to legal studies, research, and training. They were formed with the vision of improving the quality of legal studies, and NLUs provide integrated undergraduate and postgraduate law courses mostly through merit-based entrance tests such as CLAT. NLUs focus on a multidisciplinary orientation with law integrated with other subjects such as economics, political science, and sociology. Renowned for their strenuous curriculum, moot court competitions, and industry linkages, NLUs graduate highly competent legal professionals. With state-of-the-art infrastructure, qualified faculty, and emphasis on innovation and justice, NLUs contribute significantly to India's legal landscape and governance.

name: National Law School of India University (NLSIU)
description: The National Law School of India University (NLSIU) Bengaluru is the first and foremost law university of India, founded to establish new benchmarks in legal education. A leader in academic quality and innovative pedagogy, NLSIU provides integrated undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in law. The university focuses on interdisciplinarity, practical training, and critical thinking through moot courts, legal aid clinics, and research work. With one of the most competitive admission processes and a renowned faculty, NLSIU consistently graduates top legal minds and scholars annually. It significantly influences public policy, legal reforms, and promoting justice at the national as well as international level.

name: Netaji Subhash Engineering College
description: Netaji Subhash Engineering College, situated in Ranabhutia, is an established college focused on providing excellent engineering and technology education. With an affiliation to a well-known university, the college provides several undergraduate and postgraduate courses in engineering sciences. It is famous for its solid academic curriculum, experienced staff, and emphasis on practical, industry-based learning. The campus boasts state-of-the-art laboratories, smart classrooms, and research and innovation support facilities. Technical events, internships, and extracurricular activities are promoted to ensure overall development. The college strives to develop skilled, responsible professionals who can face global challenges.

name: Sri Shanmugha College of Engineering and Technology
description: Sri Shanmugha College of Engineering and Technology, Puthur, is a burgeoning college dedicated to offering quality technical education. The college provides undergraduate and postgraduate courses in engineering and technology and emphasizes academic excellence and skill development. Guided by highly experienced faculty and state-of-the-art infrastructure, the campus offers a friendly learning environment for students. Focus is given on innovation, practical training, and interaction with industry to equip students for actual challenges. The college also urges participation in extracurricular and co-curricular activities to develop the individual as a whole. Guided by its mission to develop competent professionals, the college aims to contribute positively to society and industry.

name: College of Engineering Osmania University
description: Osmania University's College of Engineering in Hyderabad is among the oldest and most respected engineering colleges in India. It is run under the prestigious Osmania University and provides undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in a range of disciplines of engineering. Strong academic standards, faculty experience, and a history of graduating competent professionals are some of the strong features of the college. With state-of-the-art laboratories, research centers, and emphasis on innovation, it develops technical superiority and analytical skills. The campus offers a dynamic academic environment, engaging students in projects, seminars, and competitions. It has good industry connections, ensuring students are equipped for both national and international opportunities.

name: Harcourt Butler Technical University
description: Harcourt Butler Technical University (HBTU) Kanpur is a world-class technical university with a rich tradition of excellence in engineering and applied sciences. With its strong academic legacy and research-intensive philosophy, HBTU has undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs in several disciplines. The university adopts the art of traditional values with progressive education, coupled with experienced mentors and state-of-the-art laboratories. With emphasis on innovation, industrial association, and developing skills, HBTU sends students to face real-life challenges. The campus fosters an active scholarly atmosphere, ensuring active participation in technical events, projects, and entrepreneurship. HBTU goes on producing competent professionals who make meaningful contributions to the industry and society.

name: Amity University
description: Amity University Noida is a premier private university with academic excellence, state-of-the-art infrastructure, and global perspective. The university provides a diverse range of programmes in engineering, management, law, science, humanities, and others. Amity concentrates on all-round development through a combination of theoretical learning, practical training, and enhancement of soft skills. With modern facilities, expert faculty, and excellent industry ties, Amity equips the students for challenging professional lives. The campus fosters research, innovation, and entrepreneurship, with students nudged to think critically and think out of the box. A dynamic student life, club activity, events, and international exposure further enhance the quality educational experience in Amity Noida.

name: Vellore Institute of Technology
description: Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT), Vellore, is a top-ranked private university renowned for its engineering, technology, and research excellence. The institute has an impressive array of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs in various fields. VIT is acclaimed for its state-of-the-art infrastructure, innovative laboratories, and strong focus on entrepreneurship and innovation. The university provides a diverse learning environment with students from all over India and the world. With top-class faculty, industry connections, and an outcome-oriented education system, VIT prepares its students well for international careers. It also fosters all-around development through extracurricular activities, clubs, and global exposure.

name: Audyogik Shikshan Mandal’s Nextgen Technical Campus
description: Audyogik Shikshan Mandal's Nextgen Technical Campus, situated in Talegaon Dabhade, is a rising institution committed to delivering quality technical education. It provides undergraduate courses in engineering and is committed to filling the gap between academia and industry by delivering practical learning and innovation. The campus possesses modeArn infrastructure, state-of-the-art laboratories, and a student-centered environment that fosters creativity and skill building. With emphasis placed on experiential training, industry exposure, and comprehensive development, the institution equips students to excel in the competitive international arena. The committed faculty and conducive learning environment assist in the development of future professionals dedicated to technological progress and societal development.

name: Sapthagiri College of Engineering
description: Sapthagiri College of Engineering in Bangalore is a renowned institution that imparts quality education in engineering. It is affiliated to Visvesvaraya Technological University and has a strong academic program, experienced teaching staff, and world-class infrastructure. The college has a vibrant learning atmosphere based on state-of-the-art research laboratories, research centers, and industry-institute interactions. The college focuses on innovation, development of technical skills, and holistic development through seminars, workshops, and co-curricular activities. Focusing on creating capable and responsible professionals, Sapthagiri College of Engineering prepares its students to face the changing global technology scenario and contribute to society.

name: ABESIT GROUP OF INSTITUTIONS
description: ABESIT Group of Institutions, at Ghaziabad, is a well-known educational organization providing quality technical as well as professional education. It offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses in engineering, technology, and management. The institute has a strong focus on academic excellence, skill enhancement, and industry preparedness. With state-of-the-art infrastructure, well-furnished laboratories, and veteran faculty members, ABESIT offers a dynamic learning environment. The campus fosters innovation, research, and co-curricular activities to facilitate overall student growth. With frequent workshops, seminars, and industry interactions, the institute readies the students to combat real-world challenges and groom them into capable professionals for global opportunities.

name: Chennai Institute of Technology
description: Chennai Institute of Technology (CIT) is situated in Malayambakkam, Chennai, and is a well-reputed engineering college with a robust academic curriculum and industry-focused education. It provides various undergraduate and postgraduate courses in engineering, technology, and management. CIT focuses on innovation, research, and practical learning through updated laboratories and active association with top companies. The campus offers an environment that supports learning with good infrastructure, committed faculty, and active student development programs. Keeping in mind the integrated education concept, the institute makes the students undertake technical events, internships, and entrepreneurial activities, readying them to face global industry requirements and social needs efficiently.

name: Vardhaman College of Engineering
description: Vardhaman College of Engineering, Hyderabad, is a well-known institution with a strong focus on academic excellence and technical education innovation. It provides a range of undergraduate and postgraduate engineering and management courses, aided by state-of-the-art infrastructure and well-equipped labs. The college focuses on research, industry interaction, and learning by doing to prepare students for industry and improve employability. With a bent towards all-round development, Vardhaman promotes involvement in technical contests, cultural activities, and leadership programs. The faculty is competent and student-oriented, offering effective academic counseling. The college also has a good placement record, equipping the students for fruitful professional life in a competitive world.

name: Sona College of Technology
description: Sona College of Technology, Salem, is a prestigious institution imparting quality education in technology, engineering, and management. Offering a variety of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses, the college is backed by state-of-the-art infrastructure, well-equipped laboratories, and accomplished faculty. With a focus on innovation, research, and industry partnerships, Sona creates a learning environment that gives students a global career. The college promotes balanced growth through technical functions, cultural events, and leadership development. With excellent placement assistance and an emphasis on entrepreneurship and skill development, Sona College of Technology strives to generate capable and socially committed professionals.

name: GMR Institute of Technology
description: GMR Institute of Technology, which is situated in Rajam, Vizianagaram, is a premier engineering college that focuses on academic excellence and innovation. It provides various undergraduate and postgraduate engineering and technology programs with the help of state-of-the-art infrastructure and well-equipped laboratories. The institute provides a research-oriented environment with strong emphasis on practical learning, industry exposure, and skill enhancement. With a committed and experienced faculty, GMRIT focuses on holistic education involving personality development and moral values. The campus promotes student engagement in technical events, sports, and cultural activities. Effective placement support and industry associations facilitate students to get valuable career opportunities.

name: AMC Engineering College
description: AMC Engineering College, Bengaluru, is a well-known college that provides quality engineering and technology education. The college offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses in all branches of engineering underpinned by a well-designed curriculum and experienced faculty. Equipped with state-of-the-art infrastructure, modern laboratories, and an emphasis on innovation, AMC fosters a teaching-learning environment for academic and professional development. The academy is also noted for creating an interactive learning environment and promoting entrepreneurship and innovation.

name: Regional College of Management
description: Regional College of Management (RCM), Bhubaneswar is a reputed educational institution with a strong emphasis on management studies and professional education. It has a range of undergraduate and postgraduate courses that are specifically created to impart hands-on skills, industry insight, and leadership abilities in the students. RCM focuses on a combination of academic intensity and exposure to real-world situations through case studies, internships, and collaborative learning, making it a very sought-after option for students who want to pursue prosperous careers in business and management areas. The college is also well-known for its cooperative staff and latest infrastructure that contribute to a proper learning environment.

name: Ramaiah Institute of Management (MSRIM)
description: M.S. Ramaiah Institute of Management (MSRIM), Bangalore, is a well-known private management school founded in 1995 with a two-year full-time PGDM program with various specializations like Finance, Marketing, HR, Operations, and Business Analytics. The institute is famous for its industry tie-ups and experiential learning, providing students with internship, live projects, and international exposure opportunities. With state-of-the-art infrastructure and seasoned faculty, MSRIM provides a holistic learning experience. It enjoys good placement in terms of average packages of ₹8 lakh annually and top industries from diverse sectors as recruiters, making it a choice for management studies.

name: Rajagiri Centre for Business Studies [RCBS]
description: Rajagiri Centre for Business Studies (RCBS) at Kochi in Kerala is a top-ranked business school that delivers value-based and innovative management education of high standards. RCBS is famous for its intense academic curriculum and holistic development culture and delivers MBA, PGDM, and MHRM programs that blend classroom education with practical exposure. RCBS has state-of-the-art infrastructure facilities in the campus and highly qualified and experienced professionals and scholars forming the faculty. RCBS gives high priority to ethics, leadership, and social responsibility and enrolls students who are poised to succeed in both corporate and entrepreneurial careers. It has a strong industry interface, global partnerships, and dynamic campus life, making it a top choice among management aspirants.

name: Muthoot Business School
description: Muthoot Business School, Kochi, Kerala, is a top-ranked school that provides high-quality management education with emphasis on ethics and leadership. Supported by the highly acclaimed Muthoot Group, the school is focused on grooming skilled and socially committed business professionals. It provides an integrated MBA program meant to combine academic excellence with real-world industry exposure. It has state-of-the-art facilities, highly qualified faculty, and a learning environment that fosters innovation and critical thinking. With a focus on entrepreneurship, global perspective, and industry integration, Muthoot Business School equips students with the requisite confidence and competence to confront the dynamic realities of corporate life.

name: Kalinga Inst of Industrial Technology, (KIIT)
description: Kalinga Institute of Industrial Technology (KIIT) in Odisha is a well-known private university that excels academically as well as in campus life. Founded in Bhubaneswar, it provides a plethora of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral degrees in various fields including engineering, management, law, medicine, and humanities. KIIT is noted for its hi-tech infrastructure, veteran faculty, and focus on research and innovation. The university brings students from all over India and the world, providing a cosmopolitan experience. With its industrial connections and emphasis on all-around development, KIIT is still a top institution for higher education in eastern India.

name: Loyola Institute of Business Administration
description: Loyola Institute of Business Administration (LIBA), Chennai, founded in 1979, is a top Jesuit business school situated in the Loyola College campus at Nungambakkam. It has a two-year full-time PGDM course as well as part-time, executive, and doctoral programs in management. With a reputation for its focus on ethics, leadership, and scholarship, LIBA combines strong academics with extensive industry interaction. The institute is SAQS and AACSB accredited and consistently rated as one of the best management schools in India. It promotes value-based education, social responsibility, and global acumen through several centres of excellence and international partnerships.

name: Banaras Hindu University
description: Institute of Management Studies (IMS), Banaras Hindu University (BHU), Varanasi, is one of India's most established and respected management schools. With roots going back to 1968 as a department and being granted the status of an independent institute in 2015, IMS provides MBA courses—comprising specializations in International Business and Agribusiness—along with PGDBA and Ph.D. courses Guidance Forever. Admissions are through CAT scores, supported by Group Discussions and Personal Interviews, augmented by academic credentials

name: XIM University
description: XIM University, previously Xavier University, Odisha, is one of the best Jesuit institutions founded in 2013 and based on the tradition of XIM Bhubaneswar (XIMB), set up in 1987. It is based on a 55-acre campus at Bhubaneswar and provides a variety of courses through its various schools of business, sustainability, HR, economics, law, and so on. It is renowned for its scholarly merit, moral leadership, and close industry tie, XIM University stresses experiential learning and social responsibility. It is ranked consistently among India's top private universities, with national recognition of the flagship programs at XIMB in terms of placement.

name: UPES University
description: UPES (University of Petroleum and Energy Studies) Dehradun, founded in 2003, is a well-known private university focusing on energy, petroleum, infrastructure, and allied industries, in addition to a variety of programs in engineering, law, management, design, and health sciences. Situated in the picturesque foothills of the Himalayas, UPES provides industry-oriented education with state-of-the-art infrastructure, experienced faculty, and robust industry associations to equip students with real-world exposure and career prospects. Graded "A" by NAAC, the university focuses on innovation, research, and skill development with the objective of graduating competent professionals trained to address the changing needs of industries worldwide.

admissionProcess.title: Step 1: Application
admissionProcess.description:
Visit the UPES website and complete the online application form.
Provide personal and academic details.
Upload a photograph, signature, and other required documents.
Pay the application fee online.

admissionProcess.title: Step 2: Selection criteria
admissionProcess.description:
Selection depends on the specific program, but can include one or more of the following:
UPESEAT: The university's own entrance exam, conducted online.
National-Level Exams: JEE Main, CUET, SAT, or other national tests depending on the course.
Board Merit: Based on class 12th marks.
UPESDAT: For design programs

admissionProcess.title: Step 3: Final selection
admissionProcess.description:
For certain courses, a final round may be required after meeting the initial selection criteria.
This can include a portfolio presentation and/or an interview.

placementHighlights: Placement Rate: A 95% placement rate for enrolled students was mentioned for the 2025 placements.
Industry Alignment: UPES maintains industry-aligned programs and a strong placement support system.

name: Jamia Millia Islamia
description: Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI) in New Delhi is a highly regarded central university founded in 1920 with a rich history, academic distinction, and social commitment to inclusive education. Founded initially in Aligarh and subsequently shifted to Delhi in 1935, JMI provides an array of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in the disciplines of humanities, social sciences, natural sciences, engineering, law, education, architecture, media, and management. The university is known for its cosmopolitan campus life, research productivity, and nationally recognized departments of mass communication, law, and architecture. With a strong focus on diversity and social justice, JMI continues to be an important institution for shaping scholars and professionals in India and the world.

name: Institute of Rural Management Anand
description: MICA (Mudra Institute of Communications, Ahmedabad) is a leading management school in India, founded in 1991, with expertise in strategic marketing, branding, media, and communications. Based in Shela, Ahmedabad, MICA stands out for its combination of creativity and business strategy, delivering flagship programs such as the PGDM and PGDM-Communications, along with doctoral and certificate programs. It is the sole residential school in the Asia-Pacific region dedicated solely to communications management with a lively 19-acre campus featuring media labs, a campus radio station, and contemporary learning spaces. MICA is driven by innovation, culture, and industry-centricity, graduating students who lead in leadership positions in marketing, advertising, and digital strategy.

name: MICA
description: MICA Ahmedabad (Mudra Institute of Communications), founded in 1991 in Shela, is India's first and foremost institute to concentrate solely on strategic marketing and communications. Popularly termed "The School of Ideas," MICA has its flagship PGDM and PGDM-C programs, with a Fellow Programme in Management (Communication) for students looking to pursue a career in brand management, advertising, media, digital strategy, and consumer insights. Spanning across a verdant 19-acre residential campus, it has cutting-edge media labs, a campus radio station, and an energetic student life. MICA boasts a 100% placement record consistently, with the average package of 2023 at ₹20.09 LPA and the maximum package at ₹36 LPA. Ranked among India's best B-schools for marketing and communication, MICA combines creativity, strategy, and intellectual depth to train the leaders of the industry.

name: Tata Institute of Social Sciences
description: The Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Mumbai, founded in 1936 and a deemed university since 1964, is a leading institution for social science learning and research in India. It is situated in Deonar, Mumbai, and covers about 21 acres of land and a vibrant academic setup with 12 schools and various research and resource centers with postgraduate and doctoral courses in social work, public policy, health systems, law, education, disaster studies, and media. Reputed for its strong field-based learning and social orientation, TISS promotes a vibrant and inclusive student life, complemented by facilities such as the Sir Dorabji Tata Memorial Library, one of India's premier social science libraries, in addition to well-equipped recreational areas and sports facilities. The institute has ranked consistently among the best universities in India based on its academic as well as social contributions

name: Dayalbagh Educational Institute (DEI)
description: Dayalbagh Educational Institute (DEI), founded in 1917 and accorded deemed university status in 1981, is a prestige institution situated in the serene, self-sufficient colony of Dayalbagh on the outskirts of Agra. Based on the philosophy of the Radhasoami faith, it focuses on value-based, integrated education. DEI has a broad spectrum of courses—ranging from engineering, management, arts, and sciences to commerce, education, and social sciences—delivered through regular and distance modes. Its premises have state-of-the-art facilities: a large library with more than 180,000 books, state-of-the-art laboratories, computer centers fully equipped, seminar halls, hostels, and sports facilities. NAAC accredited with 'A'/'A+' grade and AICTE approved, DEI balances academic intensity, spiritual roots, and social accountability across courses

name: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University
description: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University, or IP University as it is popularly known, was founded in the year 1998 by the Government of the National Capital Territory of Delhi. It is an affiliating and teaching state university deemed by UGC, graded A++ by NAAC with a CGPA of 3.56 for 2023–2030 NAAC Accreditation .The mission of the university revolves around providing market-driven professional education in fields such as engineering, management, law, medicine, pharmacy, education, and nursing, with an emphasis on research, innovation, and social contribution Spread across 60 acres of green campus, GGSIPU is India's first Net-Zero Energy campus. It has state-of-the-art, environmentally friendly facilities like rainwater harvesting, solar power systems, pedestrian-friendly landscaping, plantations, ICT-enabled smart classrooms, a high-capacity auditorium, well-stocked libraries with rich digital resources, and superior labs for sciences, law, and technology.
imagePublicId: college_images/1756380579568-guru gobind singh indraprastha university delhi.jpg

name: Lovely Professional University
description: Lovely Professional University (LPU), established in 2005 by Dr. Ashok Mittal, is India's largest private university, situated in Phagwara near the city of Jalandhar, Punjab. Spreading across a large green campus (~600 acres), it accommodates a vibrant and diverse student community of more than 34,000, both domestic and foreign learners. NAAC accredited with an 'A++' grade and endorsed by organizations such as UGC, ACBSP, and ACU, LPU is famous for its multi-disciplinary programs—right from engineering, management, and law to agriculture, design, and others. Industry integration is infused in its DNA through live projects, incubation, and tie-ups with international brands. Famous for state-of-the-art infrastructure and experiential learning, LPU nurtures innovation, global visibility, and entrepreneurship.

name: The Department of Management Sciences (PUMBA)
description: Department of Management Sciences (PUMBA), Savitribai Phule Pune University: Founded in 1971, the Department of Management Sciences (PUMBA) at Savitribai Phule Pune University is one of India's early public B‑schools, providing flagship programs such as the dual-specialization MBA++, MBA (Pharma‑Biotech), Executive MBA, and PhD in management. It adopts a trimester-based, credit-based curriculum with special focus on applied learning through industrial and social projects, internships, and regular assessments. Located on a green 414-acre campus, PUMBA has state‑of‑the-art classrooms, a fully‑equipped library, computer labs, syndicate rooms, and consistent 24×7 Wi‑Fi.

name: University Business School  (UBS)
description: University Business School (UBS), founded in 1995 as a constituent unit of Panjab University, Chandigarh, is a leading management school that is known for its academic excellence and industry-relevant courses. The school provides an integrated MBA program with a wide range of specializations such as General Management, Entrepreneurship, Human Resource Management, and International Business. The school has a strong faculty base drawn from academia and industry, which creates a lively learning environment. UBS focuses on experiential exposure through compulsory summer internships, research projects, and industry interfaces, making students job-ready for the corporate sector. It is strategically located in Chandigarh, giving access to a booming business environment that makes students' placement opportunities and networking robust.

name: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham
description: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham, Coimbatore, is a world-class multi-campus, multidisciplinary university with a passion for academic excellence, innovative research, and integrative education. Founded in 1994, it has emerged as a highly ranked institution of national stature recognized by the University Grants Commission (UGC) and accredited by NAAC with an 'A++' grade. The university has diverse programs in engineering, medicine, management, science, humanities, and social sciences. Ranks highly for its focus on values-based learning and innovative research, Amrita balances technology with social responsibility. Its research-intensive campus at Coimbatore boasts state-of-the-art facilities, world-class labs, and an energetic student culture that develops creativity and leadership. The collaborations of the university with international institutions expand the possibilities for learning, and students are geared up to succeed in an ever-changing global world.

name: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT)
description: Vinod Gupta School of Management (VGSoM) at IIT Kharagpur, founded in 1993, is the best management school in the IIT network, renowned for merging advanced technology and research-oriented academics with applied management education. Located on the vast IIT Kharagpur campus, VGSoM has a rich offering of programs such as a flagship two-year full-time MBA, executive MBA, Ph.D. studies, and specialized diplomas in business analytics. The school focuses on a serious curriculum with core management basics blended with electives in new areas such as fintech, analytics, and technology management. With access to cutting-edge infrastructure, vast libraries, and dynamic campus life infused with cultural and professional activities, VGSoM encourages thought leadership that can address the challenges of modern business in a changing world.

name: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT)
description: IIT Roorkee – DoMS provides excellent value for money with good placements and a high ranking. The course is particularly good in areas such as analytics, finance, and operations. If you are aiming for product management positions in top firms, you may consider comparing with other schools such as IIT Bombay or IIMs—but for a great ROI and a friendly academic culture, IIT Roorkee is still an attractive option.

name: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT)
description: IIT Madras's Department of Management Studies (DoMS) is among India's best management schools and provides a challenging MBA program integrating engineering, analytics, and management education. With its interdisciplinary focus, DoMS capitalizes on the IIT Madras technical ecosystem to offer a program that focuses on innovation, leadership, and research. The institute encourages group learning, facilitated by senior faculty and an active peer group. Having been granted access to world-class infrastructure and an entrepreneurial setup, DoMS IIT Madras provides students with the necessary competencies to address intricate business problems within an ever-changing world.

name: Goa Institute of Management
description: Goa Institute of Management (GIM), founded in 1993, has come a long way from its humble start with six faculty members and 24 students to become a respected private business school. It now has more than 85 full-time faculty, several postgraduate programmes with over 900 students, and a huge 50+ acre campus with world-class facilities.GIM's vision is to generate knowledge and develop responsible, adaptive leaders who stay ahead in the field of management practices. The institute focuses on sensitivity towards stakeholders, ethical leadership, lifelong learning, and leadership based on vision and empathy. Its objective is to be a world-class business school, distinguished in research, education, and engagement with society.

name: Department of Management Studies, Indian Institute of Technology (DMS IIT)
description: The Department of Management Studies (DMS) is a top-notch academic department that strives for management education, research, and industry interaction. Set up with the vision to create qualified business leaders and entrepreneurs, DMS provides various postgraduate and doctoral courses in management. The department is committed to providing all-around knowledge integrating theoretical principles and practical understanding using case studies, live projects, and internships. With a focus on innovation, ethics, and international business mindsets, DMS is an institution that actively collaborates with industry partners to maintain its curriculum abreast and dynamic. The department also promotes research and consultancy programs that inform management practice and policy-making. Distinguished faculty, cutting-edge infrastructure, and an energetic student population make DMS a preferred destination for future management professionals.

name: Narsee Monjee Institute of Management (NMIMS)
description: NMIMS (Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies), Mumbai, is among India's top private universities, recognized for its scholastic achievement, pioneering curriculum, and robust industry connection. It was founded in 1981 and has since developed into a multidisciplinary university with a vast array of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs in areas like management, engineering, law, commerce, economics, liberal arts, science, and design. The Mumbai campus in the high-density locality of Vile Parle boasts advanced infrastructure, contemporary classrooms, advanced labs, and an energetic learning environment conducive to research, entrepreneurship, and all-around development. With robust focus on experiential learning, global connections, and industry engagement, NMIMS Mumbai has an active campus life with a plethora of academic, cultural, and professional activities throughout the year.

name: The Indian Institute of Foreign Trade (IIFT)
description: Indian Institute of Foreign Trade (IIFT), Kolkata is India's one of the top business schools that was founded as the second campus of IIFT Delhi in 2006. It is famous for its specialized concentration in international business, trade, and economics. It has a flagship 2-year full-time MBA in International Business, executive, as well as certificate programs. The institute has a strict academic course, good industry interface, and high placement rates, especially in trade, consulting, and financial industry sectors. With its strategic position in a key trade hub and a mix of international exposure and analytical training, IIFT Kolkata is a desirable option for aspirants looking to pursue careers in international business and economics.

name: Symbiosis Institute of Business Management - (SIBM)
description: Symbiosis Institute of Business Management (SIBM), Pune, founded in 1978, is a premier private B-school in India and a part of Symbiosis International University. Recognized for its robust industry interface, academic rigor, and holistic development of students, SIBM Pune has flagship full-time MBA courses with specializations in Marketing, Finance, Operations, and Human Resource Management. In addition to these, the institute provides MBA in Innovation and Entrepreneurship, Executive MBA, and various management development programs. With a challenging curriculum, experienced professors, state-of-the-art Lavale campus, and continually high placement rates, SIBM Pune is a popular choice for management aspirants looking for holistic business education.

name: Shailesh J. Mehta School of Management - (SJMSOM ,IITB)
description: Shailesh J. Mehta School of Management (SJMSOM) of IIT Bombay, founded in 1995, is one of India's top business schools that combines management education with technology and innovation. Situated on the campus of IIT Bombay, the school provides MBA, PhD, and Executive MBA programs to develop leaders with excellence for technology-enabled and global business environments. Premier for its powerful faculty, industry linkage, and focus on inter-disciplinary research, SJMSOM offers students valuable learning experience, state-of-the-art infrastructure, and strong placement opportunities across industries such as consulting, finance, and technology.

name: The Indian Institute of Foreign Trade (IIFT)
description: IIFT Delhi (Indian Institute of Foreign Trade) is a top-ranked autonomous business school founded in 1963 by the Government of India with the aim of boosting India's foreign trade expertise. It provides specialized management programs with a strong emphasis on international business, trade, and economics. Popular for its rigorous program, IIFT focuses on global business strategy, export-import management, and policy studies. The institute promotes a research-oriented culture and maintains collaborations with various foreign universities. The academic courses of IIFT Delhi are tailored to groom leaders skilled enough to operate in the intricate global markets, with a mix of theoretical knowledge and practical experience through case studies, industry projects, and global exposures.

name: Management Development Institute - MDI
description: Management Development Institute (MDI), Gurugram, set up in 1973 by Industrial Finance Corporation of India (IFCI) is one of India's top private business schools. Situated in the corporate capital of Gurugram, Haryana, about 12 km away from New Delhi's Indira Gandhi International Airport, MDI provides a peaceful 37-acre campus with top-of-the-line facilities.MDI is well-known for its challenging academic courses, which include the Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM), PGDM in Human Resource Management (HRM), and PGDM in International Business (IB). The institute also has specialized courses like the 18-month PGDM in Business Management and the Executive PGDM, for working professionals who want to upgrade their managerial acumen.

name: Jamnalal Bajaj Institute Of Management Studies - JBIMS
description: Jamnalal Bajaj Institute of Management Studies (JBIMS), Mumbai, founded in 1965, is among the oldest and most prestigious business schools in India, operating under the aegis of the University of Mumbai. Popularly known as the "CEO Factory of India," JBIMS has a rich history of churning out top corporate executives and entrepreneurs across various industries. The institute offers flagship programs like MMS (Master in Management Studies), which is equivalent to an MBA, and focuses on a rigorous curriculum blending theory with practical exposure. Located in the heart of Mumbai’s commercial hub, JBIMS benefits from unparalleled industry interface, guest lectures, and live projects, owing to its proximity to leading corporates and financial institutions. The institute has a solid academic base with experienced teaching staff and a vibrant student-oriented culture, rendering it a first-rate destination for management aspirants nationwide.
imagePublicId: college_images/1756460100570-Jamnalal Bajaj Institute of Management Studies Mumbai.jpeg

name: S P Jain Institute of Management and Research (SPJIMR)
description: Established in 1981 under the patronage of Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan, SPJIMR Mumbai is a premium independent management school renowned for spearheading "wise innovation"—a wisdom that advocates socially responsible and mission-oriented leadership. Triple Crown accredited (AACSB, AMBA, EQUIS), it is ranked among India's best B‑schools constantly, including #1 in India in FT MiM rankings. Situated on a lush 45‑acre urban campus in Mumbai, the institute offers academically demanding programs infused with rich, experiential, practice‑based learning—spanning from non‑classroom experiences to global immersions—shaping globally competent, values-driven leaders.

name: Faculty of Management Studies
description: Founded in 1954 by the University of Delhi and fondly referred to as the "Red Building of Dreams," FMS Delhi is an internationally acclaimed public business school regularly ranked among India's best B‑schools (currently 2nd in IIRF 2025 rankings).  NAAC accredited and DU affiliated, the institute stands for rich heritage, cooperative spirit, and innovative pedagogy blending management education with robust academic discipline.North Campus of Delhi University is the location of FMS, which imparts full‑time MBA along with executive and doctoral programs, and has extensive industry and overseas collaborations with institutions like INSEAD, ESADE, and the University of California .Although the campus is modest, there is complete access to DU's larger infrastructure—libraries, sports facilities, auditoriums, and student clubs—augmenting overall campus learning life

name: XLRI Xavier School of Management
description: XLRI – Xavier School of Management, Jamshedpur, founded in 1949 by the Jesuits, is India's oldest business school and a top private institution accredited by AACSB, AMBA, NBA, and approved by AICTE, AIU, and the Government of India .Spreading over a scenic 50-acre green campus in Jamshedpur's steel city, it provides flagship two-year full-time PGDM courses in Business Management, Human Resource Management, General Management, and other specialized areas, as well as executive, doctoral, and online learning courses .XLRI ranks 9th among Indian management schools in NIRF 2024 rankings, a testament to its academic excellence. With 100% placements for the 2024 batch of PGDM

name: IIM Shillong – Top MBA College in North-East India | Fees, Courses, Placements
description: Indian Institute of Management Shillong (IIM Shillong) is a fully-autonomous top-tier management institute located in the picturesque hills of Shillong, Meghalaya. It offers a 5-year Integrated Programme in Management (IPM) for undergraduates, a 2-year PGP (MBA) for fresh graduates, executive programmes (PGPEx, MBA-WE) for working professionals, and doctoral research tracks. The curriculum emphasises holistic development, sustainability, analytics, and leadership in dynamic business environments. With its thriving placement ecosystem, reputed recruiters, and immersive learning environment set against a scenic North-East backdrop, IIM Shillong prepares students for global careers while nurturing socially-responsible managers.

admissionProcess.title: Online Application
admissionProcess.description: Submit application form on institute portal with required documents and application fee.

admissionProcess.title: Shortlisting & Written Ability Test / Personal Interview
admissionProcess.description: Based on CAT score, shortlisted candidates appear for WAT/PI.

admissionProcess.title: Offer of Admission & Fee Payment
admissionProcess.description: final merit list released; selected candidates pay acceptance fee + caution deposit + term-1 fees.

admissionProcess.title: Registration & Commencement of Classes
admissionProcess.description: Students register on campus and classes begin around June/July.

keyHighlights.title: 100% Placement for PGP 2025 batch
keyHighlights.description: In the 2025 placement drive, IIM Shillong achieved 100% placement for the PGP batch with participation from 141 recruiters and highest package reaching ₹ 71.5 LPA.

placementHighlights: Highest Package reached ₹ 71.5 LPA in 2025 placements; average package ~ ₹ 26.44 LPA.

requiredDocuments.name: CAT Score Card
requiredDocuments.description: Required for PGP shortlisting

requiredDocuments.name: 10th & 12th Mark-sheets
requiredDocuments.description: For eligibility (e.g., for IPM: minimum 60% in 10th & 12th)

shortDescription: Explore IIM Shillong, a premier IIM offering MBA, IPM & Executive programs with top placements, excellent ROI, and scenic campus in Meghalaya.

name: IIM - Indian Institute of Management
description: Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam (IIMV) is a highly acclaimed public business school located in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is one of the elite Indian Institutes of Management (IIM) group and has been designated as an Institute of National Importance by the Government of India since 2015. IIMV has a diverse range of programmes such as the flagship Post Graduate Programme in Management (PGP), Doctoral Programme in Management (FPM), and a number of Executive Education Programmes for students as well as working professionals aspiring to pursue higher management education.
imagePublicId: college_images/1756215130391-IIIIM - Indian Institute of Management Visakhapatnam.jpg

name: IIM - Indian Institute of Management
description: Indian Institute of Management Sirmaur (IIM Sirmaur), set up in 2015 in Himachal Pradesh, is a centrally funded Institute of National Importance under the Ministry of Education, providing full-time residential programmes including MBA (General Management), MBA in Tourism, and doctoral (Ph.D.) courses, as well as Executive MBA. Situated in the midst of the Himalayas with a peaceful foothill location, it functions both from a contemporary temporary campus at Paonta Sahib and a functioning permanent campus at Dhaula Kuan as of July 2024 — with green architecture, Wi-Fi classrooms, hostels, and sustainability-oriented infrastructure. The institute follows a vision of worldwide leadership in management excellence, focusing on ethics, cross-disciplinary education, indigenous development, community involvement, and research, guided by a committed faculty and strengthened by industrial interaction and holistic pedagogical approaches
imagePublicId: college_images/1756214367516-IIM - Indian Institute of Management Sirmaur.jpg

name: IIM - Indian Institute of Management
description: Indian Institute of Management Jammu (IIM Jammu), founded in 2016, is a fast-expanding IIM situated in the union territory of Jammu and Kashmir. Dedicating itself to academic excellence, leadership, and innovation, it provides full-time MBA, Executive MBA, and doctoral programs in diversified disciplines. The institution fosters holistic development with experiential learning, industry interaction, research, and student initiatives. Its contemporary campus in Jammu and the satellite campus in Srinagar have a diverse and inclusive learning environment. IIM Jammu focuses on ethics, entrepreneurship, and national integration to develop responsible and internationally capable leaders.
imagePublicId: college_images/1756213585762-IIM - Indian Institute of Management jammujpg.jpg

name: IIM - Indian Institute of Management
description: Indian Institute of Management Nagpur (IIM Nagpur), which came into existence in 2015, is a third-generation IIM with a guidance support from IIM Ahmedabad. It is situated in a fast-growing campus at MIHAN, Nagpur. The focus of the institute is on experiential learning, innovation, and entrepreneurship through a well-planned curriculum and interactive pedagogy. MBA, Executive MBA, and doctoral-level Fellow Programs are offered by the institute, with a focus on academic excellence and leadership development. IIM Nagpur has robust industry-academia interaction, promotes student-initiated activities, and facilitates research and incubation, with a goal of shaping socially aware and globally capable leaders.
imagePublicId: college_images/1756212629479-IIM - Indian Institute of Management Nagpur.jpg

name: IIM - Indian Institute of Management
description: Indian Institute of Management Kashipur (IIM Kashipur), founded in 2011, is a self-governing premier management school based in Uttarakhand. It provides an array of academic programs such as MBA, MBA Analytics, Executive MBA, and doctoral-level Fellow Programs in Management. The institute focuses on experiential learning, innovation, and socially responsible leadership through intensive curriculum and interaction with industries. Located in a peaceful setting at the base of the Himalayas, the campus encourages an egalitarian academic and co-curricular life, with vibrant student-organized clubs, events, and incubation activities. IIM Kashipur is also recognized for its emphasis on research, entrepreneurship, sustainability, and community development.
imagePublicId: college_images/1756211536094-IIM - Indian Institute of Management, Kashipur.jpg

name: IIM - Indian Institute of Management
description: Indian Institute of Management Ranchi (IIM Ranchi), which was set up in 2009, is a self-governing premier management school based in the state of Jharkhand. Renowned for its high academic standards and value-based education, IIM Ranchi conducts several programs such as MBA, MBA-Human Resource Management, MBA-Business Analytics, and doctoral programs. The institute focuses on experiential learning, leadership development, and research-based education that is facilitated by a dynamic faculty and cutting-edge infrastructure. With a student-centered focus, a lively campus life, and several student committees and clubs, IIM Ranchi promotes all-around development, stimulating innovation, teamwork, and ethical business in the fast-changing global scenario.
imagePublicId: college_images/1756210509275-IIM - Indian Institute of Management Ranchi.jpg

name: IIM Bodh Gaya – Top IIM in Bihar for MBA & PhD Programmes
description: The Indian Institute of Management Bodh Gaya (IIM BG), which opened in 2015, is an autonomous public business school based in Bodh Gaya, Bihar. The institute offers an array of programmes including the IPM, a full-time MBA (with specialisations in Digital Business Management and Hospital and Healthcare Management) and a PhD in Management. Experiential learning, through case studies, live projects and working with other universities around the globe, is paramount to the programmes at IIM BG. The campus is equipped with advanced facilities including a sizable academic block, library, sports complex, and hostel. Placement outcomes continue to be strong, and the average package is now around INR 13.9 LPA, while the highest package is close to INR 32.5 LPA. Moreover, IIM BG has developed a mission of developing socially responsible, global-ready leaders while fostering connections as an IIM with strong partnerships with industry.

name: IIM - Indian Institute of Management
description: IIM Udaipur, situated in the city of Udaipur in the state of Rajasthan, is a top-ranked government business school founded in 2011 and declared an Institute of National Importance by the Indian government. IIM Udaipur provides a variety of management courses at postgraduate, executive, and doctoral levels with emphasis on academic intensity, research, and international exposure. IIM Udaipur is proudly accredited by the top-ranked AACSB, ranking it among the best 5% B-schools globally. It is the youngest B-school in the world to be included in both the QS 2022 Masters in Management (MiM) Rankings and the Financial Times MiM Ranking 2021, marking its sudden surge in international academic reputation. name: Indian Institute of Management Indore (IIM Indore) – Top MBA & Management Institute
description: Indian Institute of Management Indore (IIM Indore) is a leading management institute in country, located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh. As a "triple crown" accredited institute (EQUIS, AACSB and AMBA), it offers a unique five-year Integrated Programme in Management (IPM) for under-graduates and a two-year full-time PGP (MBA equivalent) programme for post-graduates. The curriculum combines foundational learning in social sciences, economics and analytics with contemporary management practice. It provides strong industry linkages with extensive international exchange opportunities and leadership experience. In 2025, the average placement package reported for PGP & IPM batch was approximately INR 29.6 LPA and the highest domestic offer was around INR 70 LPA, with over 220 recruiters taking part. The institute provides an active campus life, a residential campus, student clubs and a vision for socialy related leadership—making it preferable for high-achieving students seeking a quality management business education on par to world standards in central India.

keyHighlights.title: Global Accreditation

keyHighlights.title: Scenic Campus & World-Class Facilities
keyHighlights.description: Set atop the Kozhikode hills, the 112-acre campus offers cutting-edge infrastructure, digital classrooms, and vibrant student life.

keyHighlights.title: Innovative Learning & Global Exposure
keyHighlights.description: IIM K emphasizes experiential learning with special focus on international Exchange programmes, live projects and industry immersion to prepare students to be leaders in a cross-cultural global business environment.

name: IIM Lucknow – Top B-School in India | MBA, ABM, SM Programs
description: IIM Lucknow, founded in 1984, is one of India's topThe Indian Institute of Management Lucknow is a premier management institution in India, known for rigorous full-time flagship programmes such as PGP, PGP-ABM and PGP-SM, and executive modules including one-year IPMX and a blended MBA. With a sprawling campus in Lucknow and a strong Noida executive campus, the institute combines academic excellence, global exposure, and industry interface. Graduates secure average packages over ₹32 lakh per annum, strong summer internship stipends, and best-in-class recruiter participation. The curriculum lays great emphasis on strategic management, business analytics, international immersion, and leadership formation, preparing students for careers in consulting, finance, technology, and agribusiness. IIM Lucknow's alumni network, infrastructure, and corporate connect make it a sought-after destination for aspiring managers.management schools with high academic standards and robust industry linkages. Situated in a large, green campus, it runs flagship two-year MBA programs in addition to executive and doctoral programs. Known for its equal emphasis on theory and practice, IIM Lucknow enjoys consistent top recruiter patronage from industries such as consulting, finance, IT, and FMCG. The institute has a strong placement record with good average salary packages, and it is thus a favorite among management aspirants in the country
