name: IIM Bangalore – Top Management Institute in India | Courses, Fees, Placements
description: The Indian Institute of Management Bangalore is a premier management school located on a 100-acre forested campus in Bengaluru. Set up in 1973, the institute offers reputed PG and executive programmes in management, analytics, business innovation and research, with the new four-year UG programme to begin shortly. The IIMB curriculum focuses on world exposure, industry partnership, and sustainable leadership. With an erudite faculty, state-of-the-art infrastructure and pulsating student life, the campus nurtures academic excellence and all-round growth. The institute has a good record of placements-recent PGP batches recorded 100 % placement and an average package of around ₹34–35 LPA. It is recognized as an Institute of National Importance and continues to shape future business leaders.

admissionProcess.title: Application Submission
admissionProcess.description: Candidates must register and fill out the online application form on the IIM B official website, providing academic details, work experience (if any), and uploading CAT/GMAT scores.
admissionProcess.duration: August to September every year for PGP

admissionProcess.title: Shortlisting

admissionProcess.title: Written Ability Test (WAT) and Personal Interview (PI)
admissionProcess.description: Shortlisted candidates appear for WAT and PI rounds to assess communication, analytical thinking, leadership potential, and motivation for management education.

admissionProcess.title: Final Selection and Admission Offer
admissionProcess.description: Final merit list is prepared considering CAT/GMAT score, WAT-PI performance, academic record, and work experience. Selected candidates receive admission offers via email. Fee payment and document verification complete the process.

keyHighlights.title: Exceptional Placement Record

keyHighlights.title: Globally Recognized & Ranked

Strong international offers: 22 international offers among ~660 offers in 2025.

name: IIM Calcutta – Top Business School in Kolkata | Flagship MBA & Executive Programmes
description: The Indian Institute of Management Calcutta, founded in the year 1961 in Joka, Kolkata, is a premier business school that offers two-year flagship MBA courses, one-year executive programs, and doctoral studies to its large pool of students seeking career opportunities in consulting, finance, operations, and analytics. The campus is scenic with hostels alongside the lakes, strong industry linkage, and a rich alumni network. With rigorous admission criteria, that include CAT, WAT, and PI, coupled with global linkages, graduates from IIM Calcutta secure top packages and roles across industries. Innovation, leadership, and entrepreneurial thinking are nurtured at this institute, turning it into one of the sought-after destinations for management aspirants.

admissionProcess.title: Application & CAT Registration

keyHighlights.description: Set across a lush lakeside campus in Kolkata, IIM Calcutta provides a world-class environment with advanced classrooms, hostels and student amenities.

keyHighlights.title: 100% Final Placements & Strong Recruiter Base
keyHighlights.description: The institute achieves 100% placement for its flagship programmes, with average CTC around ₹34 LPA and top roles in consulting & finance.

keyHighlights.title: Diverse Programmes & Global Exposure
keyHighlights.description: From MBA to Executive and PhD programmes, the institute offers diverse paths with international tie-ups and industry immersion.

keyHighlights.title: Rigorous Admission & Elite Peer Group

name: IIM Ahmedabad – Premier Business School in India | Top MBA & PG Courses
description: The Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad is a premier management institution in management education and allied areas, was established in 1961, located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Renowned for its rigorous postgraduate programmes including the flagship two-year PGP (MBA), one-year PGPX, MBA-FABM and PhD, the Institute boasts world-class faculty, state-of-the-art facilities and a campus spanning over 100 acres. It consistently ranks #1 amongst Indian management schools. With strong industry linkages, 100% placement record and high average packages, IIM Ahmedabad offers an enriching environment for future leaders in consulting, finance, analytics, operations and management. In addition, innovation, sustainability, and global exposure are the focus of the institute in curricular and research matters.

admissionProcess.title: Online Application Submission
admissionProcess.description: Application portal opens and candidates submit their online application for PGP/PGP-FABM (and other programmes) along with supporting documents and entrance test score.

admissionProcess.title: Shortlisting for AWT/PI
admissionProcess.description: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria (including new CAT cut-offs) are shortlisted for the Analytical Writing Test (AWT) and Personal Interview (PI).

admissionProcess.title: AWT & Personal Interview (PI)
admissionProcess.description: Shortlisted candidates appear for the AWT and PI rounds conducted at various centres (online/offline) to assess aptitude, profile, and fit.

admissionProcess.title: Final Offer, Wait-list & Enrollment
admissionProcess.description: Final selection results are announced, admission offers sent, wait-listed candidates may be selected, and successful candidates complete fee payment, document submission, and enrolment.

admissionProcess.title: Session Commencement

keyHighlights.title: Flagship Programmes

keyHighlights.title: Excellent Placements
keyHighlights.description: Graduates regularly secure high-value placements with top consulting, finance, tech and agribusiness firms; average package ~₹34 LPA.

keyHighlights.title: Research & Industry Connect
keyHighlights.description: Strong research centres in digital transformation, sustainability, public systems; active industry collaborations and global exposure.

name: GSFC University
description: GSFC University, Vadodara, Gujarat, is a budding university committed to offering industry-centric education in engineering, science, and management. It was founded by Gujarat State Fertilizers & Chemicals Ltd. The university merges theoretical knowledge with real-world skills to equip the students with challenges of the real world. The university focuses on innovation, research, and sustainability, and it delivers a curriculum to fulfill the needs of contemporary industry. With qualified faculty, world-class infrastructure, and close industry ties, GSFC University promotes a learning ecosystem that stimulates critical thinking and professional growth. The university seeks to build competent, responsible, and future-capable professionals dedicated to making meaningful contributions to society and industry.

name: Karnavati University, Uvarsad
description:
Karnavati University is a state-private university that is approved by UGC. The university is a member of the Association of Indian Universities, New Delhi. The university was established in 2017 under the Karnavati Medical and Educational Trust. Some of the colleges under the Karnavati University Gandhinagar are recognised by the Bar Council of India and AICTE. Some of the courses of Karnavati University Ahmedabad are provided as per the norms set by the Dental Council of India and Gujarat University.

Karnavati University through various constituent colleges and departments offers UG, PG, PhD, and other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management, Design, Law, Liberal Arts & Mass Communication, and Technology streams. Karnavati University is ranked 37 by NIRF 2023 under the Dental category. Karnavati University Gandhinagar's constituent college known as the Unitedworld School of Law was earlier affiliated with the Gujarat University (State University). To provide hands-on experience to students, the university has set up a Karnavati Centre for Experiential and Immersive Learning (KCEIL).

name: GNIOT Institute of Management Studies (GIMS) Greater Noida – PGDM & MBA College
description: GNIOT Institute of Management Studies (GIMS) based in Great Noida in Delhi-NCR is a future-ready business school approved by AICTE and HLACT (UK) accredited. The business school focuses on experiential learning, entrepreneurial thinking and providing students global exposure, via international collaborations. GIMS provides a flexibility in its industry-responsive curriculum, so students can learn with faculty, blending academic accountability with industry experience – both academic and corporate. The Knowledge Park-II region is where we are located and experience corporate gatherings, workshops and an excellent placement cell to develop the future leaders in business. The meaningful student take this learning experience into the real business setting, while achieving global certifications and support community of peers for innovation and growth.

admissionProcess.title: Screening of Application

admissionProcess.title: Entrance Test & GD/PI
admissionProcess.description: Eligible candidates take GAT or CMAT/CAT/XAT/MAT, followed by Group Discussion and Personal Interview.

admissionProcess.title: Final Selection & Offer

keyHighlights.title: Accredited & Recognised

keyHighlights.title: Experiential Learning Culture
keyHighlights.description: Strong emphasis on workshops, industrial visits and business simulation for holistic education.

keyHighlights.title: Strategic Location & Campus Life
keyHighlights.description: Located in Knowledge Park II, Greater Noida—close to Delhi-NCR hubs, offering vibrant campus life and access to business ecosystems.

placementHighlights: Strong industry interface with corporate visits and industrial training, international immersion programmes for global exposure, student events and workshops for holistic development, and a dedicated corporate resource centre with an active alumni network supporting placements and mentoring.

shortDescription: GIMS Greater Noida facilitates an industry-focused PGDM programme including global connections and cutting-edge campus in Delhi-NCR for the future business leaders.

name: Narayana Business School (NBS)
description: NBS Ahmedabad is ranked 35 (Employability Rank), 4 (State Rank), and 16 (Zone Rank) by the IIRF 2024 under the Top 50 Schools of Eminence for Employability. Further, the college has also been ranked 27 by IIRF 2024 in the 'Best Private B-Schools' category. Narayana Business School Ahmedabad provides more than 4 PG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management and various other streams. Narayana College Ahmedabad was established in 2001 and is approved by the AICTE. Located in Sarkhej, Ahmedabad, this reputed college offers MBA + PGPCE and PGDM as flagship courses. NBS Ahmedabad Narayana has state-of-the-art infrastructure. Business School Ahmedabad has over 60 faculty members. Narayana Business School is also an official member of AACSB.

name: FOSTIIMA Business School
description: FOSTIIMA Business School in Dwarka, New Delhi is a well-known management school founded by alumni of IIM Ahmedabad. It provides a full-time two-year PGDM course, which has been approved by AICTE, with emphasis on imparting excellent academic and practical management skills. The campus provides state-of-the-art facilities such as air-conditioned classrooms, a fully equipped library, and hostels. The faculty of FOSTIIMA consists of industry experts and academicians with good teaching and mentorship skills. The school has remarkable placement records, with major recruiters such as Axis Bank, ICICI Bank, and Wipro, providing an average salary of more than ₹11 lakh annually. Admission is on the basis of CAT, XAT, CMAT, or GMAT scores.

name: SOIL Institute of Management
description: SOIL Institute of Management, situated in the midst of Gurgaon, Haryana, is a top business school known for its progressive style of management education. With the aim to develop inspired leaders, SOIL provides a holistic learning experience that combines business intelligence with human values. The Gurgaon campus is the home of the 1-year Post Graduate Program in Management (PGPM) and Executive Programs, which serve working professionals looking to build leadership skills. With its prime location in Sector 44, the campus offers students exposure to a buzzing corporate environment. The campus is integrated with the objective of all-round development, and it incorporates smart classrooms, a comprehensive library, and an auditorium with smart audiovisual technology. Every level of the campus is infused with one of SOIL's fundamental values: Mindfulness, Compassion, Ethics, Sustainability, and Diversity, so that the very atmosphere on campus inspires both personal and professional development. The Gurgaon campus is a vibrant center for future leaders who are trained in a curriculum with a strong focus on experiential learning, industry interface, and a focus on social impact.

name: HIERANK Business School [HBS]
description: HIERANK Business School (HBS) Noida is a rising management school committed to providing industry-centric education in business and management. Situated in the center of Noida, HBS provides courses like MBA and BBA, integrating academic education with exposure. The institute lays stress on the development of skills, innovation, and entrepreneurship, with the aim of equipping students for changing business environments. Equipped with state-of-the-art infrastructure, well-qualified faculty, and frequent industry interaction, HBS facilitates holistic growth. It also offers placement guidance and internships to enable students to establish lucrative careers. HBS attempts to develop responsible professionals with knowledge, leadership skills, and a global business outlook.

name: Woxsen University
description: Woxsen University, founded in 2014 in the vicinity of Hyderabad, Telangana, is a contemporary private university sprawling over a 200-acre fully residential campus. It has a broad spectrum of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs offered under its several schools, viz., Business, Technology, Design, Architecture, Law, Liberal Arts, and Sciences. Recognized for its multidisciplinary pedagogy and focus on innovation, Woxsen blends cutting-edge infrastructure like AI & robotics labs, Bloomberg finance labs, and design studios to enable applied learning. Woxsen is accredited by organizations such as EFMD and is a member of esteemed worldwide associations such as AACSB, AMBA Development Network, and PRME. With a passionate emphasis on international exposure, industry interaction, and entrepreneurship, Woxsen seeks to develop future-proof professionals through combining academic excellence with practical applicability.

name: GL Bajaj Institute of Management and Research
description: GL Bajaj Institute of Management and Research at Greater Noida is a well-known business school that provides postgraduate management programs. The institute specializes in developing students' leadership, analytical skills, and managerial skills by using a blend of classroom teaching, case studies, workshops, and industrial visits. Having a state‑of‑the‑art campus that is well‑equipped with well‑furnished classrooms, computer laboratories, a library, and good resources, it seeks to create an environment favorable for learning. Focus is on industry exposure, soft-skills development, and moral practices. Students are linked to corporate recruiters through its placement cell and mentored to excel in challenging business environments.

name: I Business Institute - IBI
description: I Business Institute (IBI), Greater Noida is a private business school that provides a full-time Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) course. IBI is famous for industry-oriented curriculum, and it offers dual specializations in domains like Marketing, Finance, Human Resources, Operations, Business Analytics, IT, and International Business. The institute uses practical learning methods by conducting internships, live projects, workshops, and global exposure programs. It has a contemporary campus with modern class rooms, digital library, computer labs, hostels, and recreation facilities. With emphasis on personality development, leadership training, and strong corporate connections, IBI prepares students for vibrant careers in the business arena.

name: Fortune Institute of International Business (FIIB)
description: Fortune Institute of International Business (FIIB), New Delhi is a private management institute established in 1995. It is situated in Vasant Vihar and approved by AICTE, with accreditation from NBA. FIIB provides full-time PGDM courses like PGDM General, PGDM‑Financial Management, and specializations like Marketing, Finance, Operations, Human Resource Management, OB & HR. It also provides doctoral level courses. The institute focuses on industry preparedness through experiential learning, internship, and effective faculty with industry exposure. The last few years have witnessed high placements at FIIB (~97%), with median packages of ₹8.5 lakh per year and highest packages of ₹25 lakh.

name: Shanti Business School (SBS)
description: Shanti Business School (SBS, Ahmedabad) was established in 2010 as a Corporate Citizenship Initiative of INR 7,000 Crore Chiripal Group of Industries, Shanti Business School (SBS, Ahmedabad) has, within a very short period of its existence, firmly established itself as an Institute of distinction, attracting students from across the country to transform them into industry-specific talent, which is increasingly being preferred by the management industry.

name: Marwadi University
description: Marwadi University in Rajkot, Gujarat, is a well-known university renowned for its inclusive education in different fields, such as engineering, management, law, sciences, and humanities. Academic excellence, innovation, and research-oriented education are the main thrusts of the university, which strives to produce employable and internationally oriented professionals. State-of-the-art infrastructure, experienced teaching staff, and a strong industry interface are offered by Marwadi University, which expose students to practical realities and work-oriented skills. It provides a dynamic campus life that promotes creativity, leadership, and all-around growth. Dedicated to quality education and development, the university equips students to withstand the rigors of a changing world.

name: NDIM - New Delhi Institute of Management
description: The New Delhi Institute of Management (NDIM), founded in 1992, is one of the top business schools in New Delhi, India. NDIM is renowned for being industry-focused and provides AICTE-approved PGDM courses with streams in Marketing, Finance, HR, and others. It provides practical learning through interaction with corporate, internships, and live projects. The institute has robust industry connections and is consistently ranked among the best B-schools in India. With a focus on overall development, NDIM fosters leadership, innovation, and global business skills. Its state-of-the-art infrastructure, accomplished faculty, and placement assistance make it a choice destination for management aspirants.

name: BML Munjal University (BMU)
description: BML Munjal University (BMU) at Sidhrawali, Gurugram (Haryana) is a private, campus‑based university founded by the Hero Group in 2014. It has undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs in areas like Engineering & Technology, Management, Commerce & Economics, Law, and Liberal Arts. BMU focuses on interdisciplinary learning, research, and experiential education—with around 45% of its learning being hands‑on. The campus is spread across about 50 acres and features state-of-the-art infrastructure such as smart classrooms, state-of-the-art labs, single, double, and triple‑room separate hostels, and recreational areas. BMU has good industry connections, mentor-mentee culture, global exposure programs, and healthy placements, with best salary packages going above ₹30 LPA in best-selling streams.

name: Patel Institute of Science & Management (PISM)
description: Patel Institute of Science and Management (PISM) is recognized by the Govt. of Karnataka, and is affiliated to the Bangalore North University in Bangalore. PISM is approved by AICTE and NAAC. The institution is backed by Patel Ramaiah Education and Cultural Trust and was developed with the pure intention of spreading true and best knowledge to the students. PISM offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs like BA, BBA, B.Com, MBA, M.com etc. The courses are offered in Full time mode and have the most skilled and experienced faculty members along with the best in class facilities. Located in the best location at the heart of silicon valley of India-Bangalore, besides the outer ring road at the vicinity to the Intel I.T company, The Patel Institute of Science and Management has a splendid infrastructure, the massively stretched out campus with green trees and mesmerizing views gives a relaxing feel, which makes our institution unique in one of India’s biggest metropolitan city at Bangalore.

name: Bangalore Integrated Management Academy (BIMA)
description: Bangalore Integrated Management Academy (BIMA) is a private management and computer college in Bengaluru established in 2003, administered by Geetha S Educational Trust. It is aligned to Bangalore University and endorsed by AICTE. The institution provides undergraduate and postgraduate courses such as BBA, BCA, B.Com, MBA and MCA with specializations in Marketing, Finance, HR, Strategy and Operations. BIMA focuses on intellectual rigor as well as practical preparedness through industry linkages, workshops, guest speakers, and internships. The campus has state‑of‑the‑art facilities—computer labs, library, sports areas, hostel facilities, and a cafeteria. Placement assistance is an integral part of it, enabling students to interface with companies and practice interviews.

name: NITTE School of Management (NSOM)
description: NITTE School of Management - NSOM, also known as NSOM, is a prestigious institute. NITTE School of Management - NSOM is a renowned educational institution and offers courses at PG level. Some of the popular programmes include MBA/PGDM. NSOM offers a total of 2 courses to students in 10 specialisations such as HealthCare & Hospital, Human Resources, International Business, Operations, Retail, Sales & Marketing, Transport & Logistics. The institute provides courses that are approved by AICTE. Further, the institute offers courses to students in 2 streams such as Banking, Finance & Insurance and Business & Management Studies. NSOM courses are offered to students with a fee of INR 5,75,000. In addition to this, the institute has a total seat intake of 180 students.

name: International School of Management Excellence (ISME)
description: International School of Management Excellence (ISME), Bangalore is a private business school established in 2006 under the umbrella of the NVT Group. It provides an array of management, commerce, and technology‑oriented programs such as PGDM (full‑time and weekend), BBA, BCom, BCA, MCA, and Ph.D. The institute is approved by AICTE, accredited by NBA, and focuses on global exposure, industry‑relevant curriculum, and experiential learning. ISME has international collaborations, value‑added certifications, able to teach with corporate & international industry experience, and high placement rates—recent batches have had average offers around ₹8‑10 LPA, with the top offers in excess of ₹14 LPA.

name: Shree L R Tiwari College of Engineering
description: Shree L. R. Tiwari College of Engineering (SLRTCE) in Mira Road, Mumbai is an engineering college set up to deliver quality technical education. It is affiliated with the University of Mumbai and approved by AICTE. The college provides undergraduate courses in Computer Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Telecommunication, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and others. It also provides postgraduate courses in specific fields. The campus boasts of modern infrastructure, such as state-of-the-art labs, central library, digital classrooms, sports facilities, and innovation cells. The college places emphasis on academic excellence, industry exposure, and personality development, with support for students in training, internships, and placement guidance for successful career development.

name: J S Kothari Business School
description: J S Kothari Business School, Mumbai, is a leading institution with a two-year full-time Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) program. The institute aims at nurturing future business leaders through a balance of academic theory and practical training. Specializations offered are Marketing, Finance, Human Resources, and Information Technology. Industry exposure, communication skills, and global outlook are given thrust through workshops, internships, and immersion programs. With state-of-the-art infrastructure, experienced teachers, and a prime location in Mumbai, it offers students excellent learning and networking prospects. The school seeks to develop innovation, leadership, and ethical business acumen in an active learning environment.

name: Pune Institute of Business Management (PIBM)
description: Pune Institute of Business Management is one of the top B-schools in India, which was established in the year 2007. Affiliated to Savitribai Phule Pune University, the college offers PG courses. Students seeking admission must meet the eligibility criteria and apply by filling out the online application form. According to the Times B-School Survey 2025, PIBM ranks 33 in the Top Private B-Schools, and 44 in the Top 100 B-Schools. Further, it has also been ranked 63 by the Business Today Ranking 2024 in the MBA/PGDM category. The college also has a dedicated placement center that helps the students get placed in reputed companies across the country.

name: Imperial College of Engineering & Research (ICOER)
description: Imperial College of Engineering & Research (ICOER), Pune, is an engineering and management college that was founded in 2006‑07. It is situated in Wagholi on the Nagar‑Pune Road and comes under the JSPM trust. ICOER is associated with Savitribai Phule Pune University, is approved by AICTE, and has an "A" grade accreditation. The college has undergraduate courses in streams such as Computer, Mechanical, Civil, and Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering, and postgraduate courses such as Engineering specialisations and MBA. The notable features are well‑equipped laboratories, state‑of‑the‑art classrooms, strong faculty, a structure wherein the faculty mentors small groups of students for advice, and active placement and industry interaction.

name: Indira School of Business Studies
description: Indira School of Business Studies (ISBS), Pune, is a well-known PGDM institute set up in 2006 by the Indira Group of Institutes. It is AICTE-approved and its PGDM courses are NBA-accredited; its General and Marketing PGDMs are also deemed to be equivalent to an MBA by AIU. The curriculum aims at filling the industry‐academic gap with industry‐focused teaching, case studies, and contemporary learning techniques. Specialisations provided are Finance, Marketing, Human Resources, and Operations & Supply Chain Management. The institute has good placement records with various recruiters participating every year.

name: DY Patil B-School
description:
Dr. D. Y. Patil B-School is a private institute established in 2014. The institute is approved by the AICTE, Ministry of Education, Govt of India. Additionally, Dr. D. Y. Patil B-School also has membership with professional bodies such as AACSB, AIMA, CEGR, etc. It has also been ranked by various ranking bodies such as IIRF and Times B-School. Dr. D. Y. Patil B-School provides a PGDM and PGDM Global programme in four specialisations and one minor specialisations.

According to the Dr DY Patil B-School PGDM brochure 2024-26, the highest and average package offered during Dr DY Patil B-School placements 2024 stood at INR 18 LPA and INR 8.01 LPA, respectively. Further, the top recruiters during Dr DY Patil B-School placements in recent past included EY, Amazon and KPMG.

name: Dnyansagar Institute of Management and Research (DIMR)
description: Dnyansagar Institute of Management and Research (DIMR), Pune, is a known management school which is associated with Savitribai Phule Pune University and approved by AICTE. DIMR provides postgraduate courses such as MBA with specializations in Marketing, Finance, HR, Business Analytics, and others. The institute believes in all-round development through combining academic acumen with industry exposure, soft skills development, and practical business practices. By providing a committed faculty, state-of-the-art infrastructure, and close industry links, DIMR brings forward future leaders in the corporate sector. It also focuses on innovation, entrepreneurship, and ethics of business, developing able and socially responsible management professionals for the world economy tomorrow.

name: Arham-Adhyan Management Institute
description: Arham‑Adhyan Management Institute (AMI), Pune is a private management school recognized by AICTE and affiliated to Savitribai Phule Pune University. It provides two‑year postgraduate management courses like MBA and a unique PGPLE (Post Graduate Programme in Leadership & Employability), with specializations such as Finance, HR, Marketing, Business Analytics, Agribusiness, and Entrepreneurship. The campus is equipped with the latest infrastructure: smart classrooms, high‑speed wifi, computer labs, cloud‑based ERP, and other facilities. AMI focuses on hands‑on education through live projects, internships, corporate mentorships, and value‑added certification (e.g. SAP). Its placement record is good with more than 95% placement rate and highest salary packages recorded close to ₹18 LPA.

name: Kirloskar Institute of Management (KIM)
description: Kirloskar Institute of Management (KIM), Pune is an established residential management school set up by the Kirloskar Group. Its campus at Pune, established in 2010, provides a completely residential 2‑year PGDM programme approved by AICTE. The campus is located in a peaceful 32‑acre green environment at Maval with modern classrooms, AC hostels, well‑furnished labs, library, gym, and sports facilities. The curriculum is balanced between theory and practical experience: students work on live projects, business immersion, workshops, guest talks, and internships. With powerful industry connections, its PGDM has specialisations such as Finance, Marketing, HR, Operations, and Business Analytics with the aim to create well-rounded leaders.

name: ASM Institute of Business Management and Research (IBMR)
description: ASM's Institute of Business Management & Research (IBMR), Pune is a well‑recognized B‑school belonging to the Audyogik Shikshan Mandal (ASM) family. It is AICTE‑approved and is affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University. IBMR provides MBA, PGDM, and specialized management courses—including streams such as Agribusiness & Supply Chain, Emerging Technologies, and Dual Specializations. It is known for having robust industry connections, international exposure through collaborations (e.g. with Harvard's HBX CORe, IBM etc.), case‑study approach, guest lectures, workshops and experiential learning. Equipped with contemporary infrastructure, qualified faculty, and satisfactory placement records, IBMR seeks to build professionals equipped for fast-paced business settings.

name: Vishwakarma University
description: Vishwakarma University, Pune (VU) is a natural offshoot of the Vishwakarma Group of Institutions’ educational legacy spanning more than 35 years. The University has been established as a State Private University through Maharashtra Government Act in the year 2017. Being UGC approved, VU is authorized to design and implement its curriculum, conduct examinations, award degrees.

name: Institute of Industrial and Computer Management and Research (IICMR)
description: IICMR (Institute of Industrial and Computer Management and Research) in Pune is a well-known institution that provides postgraduate courses in management (MBA) and computer applications (MCA). Approved by AICTE and affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University, the institute is recognized for its academic excellence, industry-focused curriculum, and robust placement assistance. IICMR focuses on all-round development through experiential learning, research, and co-curricular activities. The campus offers state-of-the-art infrastructure, qualified faculty, and a student-centric ambiance. IICMR focuses on innovation, ethics, and professional development, empowering students to face the challenges of the global market and emerge as proficient professionals in their line of specialization.

name: MIMA Institute of Management
description: MIMA is an independent management college in Balewadi, Pune, established to create professional managers who are equipped for contemporary challenges of business. It conducts AICTE-approved two-year PGDM courses in Business Administration, Pharmaceutical Management, and Agribusiness Management. The institute focuses on industry‑oriented courses, experiential learning through case studies, live projects, internships, and international exposure. With a new and modern campus and infrastructure, MIMA fosters both academic and personal development, prioritizing values such as leadership, ethics, wisdom, and character. Its placement cell creates robust industry connections to enable students to initiate successful management careers.

name: ISMS
description: International School of Management Studies (ISMS), Pune is a prestigious business school with AICTE-approved MBA and PGDM courses affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University. ISMS is renowned for its industry-oriented curriculum, providing specializations in Marketing, Finance, HR, Operations, Business Analytics, and International Business. Experiential learning is the focus of the institute through live projects, internships, corporate training, and international exposure through international associations. Value-added certifications such as SAP, Digital Marketing, and Advanced Excel are also attained by students. ISMS looks to build future managers with state-of-the-art infrastructure, passionate faculty, and robust industry connections. ISMS has a good placement record and assists students in establishing successful careers in various sectors of business.

name: Lexicon MILE - Management Institute of Leadership and Excellence
description: Lexicon MILE (Management Institute of Leadership and Excellence) Pune is a top-ranked B-school famous for industry-oriented courses and leadership-oriented management education. The institute is affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University and approved by AICTE and provides MBA and PGDM programs to develop sharp business skills, communication, and strategic thinking abilities. Lexicon MILE focuses on experiential learning from live projects, internships, and industry interactions. The campus boasts state-of-the-art infrastructure, seasoned faculty, and a dynamic learning culture. Emphasizing discipline, innovation, and practical preparedness, the institute prepares future leaders to excel in competitive corporate environments.

name: IIEBM - Indus Business School
description: IIEBM – Indus Business School, Pune is a reputable management school with a two-year full-time PGDM program. The school is engaged in grooming future business leaders through a curriculum that blends academic theory with practical industry experience. It has specializations in Marketing, Finance, HR, Business Analytics, Supply Chain, and ERP. Recognized for its disciplined culture, highly qualified faculty, and excellent placement support, IIEBM stresses on values such as integrity, leadership, and social responsibility. The campus offers state-of-the-art infrastructure in the form of hostels, libraries, and wellness centers, providing a well-rounded learning environment. Students regularly participate in workshops, corporate interactions, and international exposure to remain industry-ready and professionally skilled.
